sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"Total nodes: {len(seg['nodes'])}")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        print(f"  {node['color']} id={node['id']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary'][:4]}...")

# Check adjacency
print("\nAdjacency:")
for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = pair
    ci = seg['nodes'][i]['color']
    cj = seg['nodes'][j]['color']
    if ci in ['W', 'R', 'N'] or cj in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        print(f"  [{i}({ci}), {j}({cj})]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
